items.name: The Lulu Mini Duffel Bag In White
items.description:
Add a touch of chic to your avatar’s look with the adorable Crossbody Lulu Bag featuring cute, stylish bows! This trendy accessory is perfect for any outfit, combining elegance and charm with its sleek design and playful bow details. Whether you're dressing up for a virtual event or just want to elevate your everyday style, this bag is a must-have. Grab yours today and carry your virtual essentials in style!

Want More Like This? Join & Shop #Foreign Closet

items.name: ❄️「Frostveil Coat [PBR]」❄️
items.description:
A luxurious long coat wrapped in soft fur trim, designed to keep you warm in the harshest of winters.
The flowing silhouette and plush textures create a balance of elegance and coziness — perfect for icy kingdoms, magical adventures, or winter fashion statements.
✨ Features
Long robe-style coat with fur-lined cuffs and collar
Elegant and cozy PBR texture work
Perfect for fantasy, RPG, or seasonal outfits
Adds a regal, wintery flair to your avatar
🔍 Keywords: winter coat, fur trim, fantasy, elegant, snow, PBR
